zh.lifeSummary: 當John Morrison II於1520年出生在蘇格蘭艾丁波時，他的父親John Morrison I25歲，母親Katherine Margaret Preston20歲。他於1537年8月7日與Katherine Margaret Preston在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波結婚。他在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波被列為merchant 。他去世於1568年6月14日在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波享年48歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Morrison II于1520年出生在苏格兰艾丁波时，他的父亲John Morrison I25岁，母亲Katherine Margaret Preston20岁。他于1537年8月7日与Katherine Margaret Preston在英国苏格兰艾丁波结婚。他在英国苏格兰艾丁波被列为merchant 。他去世于1568年6月14日在英国苏格兰艾丁波享年48岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰艾丁波。

nameMeanings.name: Morrison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: from Ó Muirgheasáin ‘descendant of Muirgheasán’, a diminutive of Muirgheas, a personal name meaning ‘sea valor’.
Scottish: from Gaelic Mac Moireasdain ‘son of Moireasdan’, a personal name cognate with Irish Muirgheasán’ (see 1 above).
Scottish and English: patronymic from the personal name   Morris  .

variants.name: Morson
meanings: English, Scottish and Irish: shortened form of   Morrison  .
English: sometimes a variant of Moorsom, a habitational name from Moorsholm in North Yorkshire. The placename derives from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + hūsum, dative plural form of hūs ‘house’.

variants.name: Morris
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

variants.name: McCorriston
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire): probably from Mac Thoireasdain ‘son of Tòireasdan or Tòrasdan’, a Gaelicized form of the Old Norse name Thórrsteinn ‘thunder stone’. It may also be from a lenited form of Gaelic Mac Moireasdain ‘son of Moireasdan’; see Morrison .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Morrison II was born in 1520, in Edinburgh, Scotland, his father, John Morrison I, was 25 and his mother, Katherine Margaret Preston, was 20. He married Katherine Margaret Preston on 7 August 1537, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom. His occupation is listed as merchant  in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom. He died on 14 June 1568, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Morrison II est né en 1520, à Edinburgh, Écosse, son père, John Morrison I, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Katherine Margaret Preston, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Margaret Preston le 7 août 1537, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Sa profession de son indiquée est merchant  à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 14 juin 1568, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Morrison II 1520 in Edinburgh, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Morrison I 25 und seine Mutter Katherine Margaret Preston 20. Er hat am 7. August 1537 in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom Katherine Margaret Preston geheiratet. sein Beruf ist als merchant  in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 14. Juni 1568 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Morrison II è nato il nel 1520 nel Edinburgh, Scotland, il suo padre, John Morrison I, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Margaret Preston, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Margaret Preston il 7 agosto 1537, nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito. La sua occupazione è indicata come merchant  nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì il 14 giugno 1568, nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Morrison IIが1520年にスコットランドエディンブルグで生まれた時，父John Morrison Iは25歳，母Katherine Margaret Prestonは20歳であった。1537年8月7日にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグでKatherine Margaret Prestonと結婚した。イギリススコットランドエディンブルグでの職業はmerchant と記録されている。彼は1568年6月14日にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグで48歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエディンブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Morrison II(이)가 1520년 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Morrison I(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Margaret Preston(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1537년 8월 7일 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 Katherine Margaret Preston(와)과 결혼했다. 그의 직업은 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 merchant 이었다. 그는 1568년 6월 14일 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Morrison II nasceu em 1520, em Edinburgh, Scotland, seu pai, John Morrison I, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Margaret Preston, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Margaret Preston em 7 de agosto de 1537, em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom. Sua profissão aparece como merchant  em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 14 de junho de 1568, em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Morrison II родился в 1520 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Morrison I было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Margaret Preston, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Margaret Preston 7 августа 1537 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания.  Он работал по профессии merchant  в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания. Он умер 14 июня 1568 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Morrison II nació en 1520, en Edinburgh, Scotland, su papá, John Morrison I, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Katherine Margaret Preston, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Katherine Margaret Preston el 7 de agosto de 1537, en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido. Su ocupación registrada era merchant  en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió el 14 de junio de 1568, en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido.
